title: Purpir AutoTotem
description: Automatically equips Totems of Undying to your offhand slot, so you don't have to manually manage them.
body:
# PurpirAutoTotem

Automatically moves Totem of Undying to your offhand when the slot is empty.

## What does it do?

When a totem saves you from death, your offhand becomes empty. PurpirAutoTotem instantly finds the next totem in your inventory and moves it to your offhand — no clicks required.

## Features

- **Auto-equip** — totems are moved from inventory to offhand automatically
- **Full inventory search** — scans hotbar and main inventory for totems
- **Toggle on/off** — configurable via ModMenu
- **Client-side only** — works on any server, no server installation needed

## Why use this?

- Hardcore survival — never die because you forgot to equip a totem
- PvP — focus on combat, not inventory management
- Raids & dungeons — stay in the action without manual totem swapping
- Mob farms — AFK safely without losing your life

## Community
Join our Telegram channel for updates, support and discussion: [t.me/purpirka](https://t.me/purpirka)
